metadata.title: Rallies
metadata.description: The multilingual table tennis platform for players, clubs, events and scoreboards.

landing.title: The home court for players, clubs and live match stories.
landing.description: Rallies brings discovery, public player presence and match-day tooling into one multilingual platform built for mobile first.

highlights.clubs: Clubs and events built for discovery
highlights.scoreboard: Private-first scoreboard with room for broadcast later

appHome.title: App home
appHome.description: This placeholder will become the authenticated starting point for onboarding, profile completion and user actions.

setup.title: Complete your player card
setup.description: Set up your public Rallies presence so players and clubs can discover and connect with you across the table tennis ecosystem.
setup.usernameTaken: This handle is already taken. Try another.
setup.usernameInvalid: Use 3 to 30 characters (letters, numbers, underscores only).
setup.bioPlaceholder: Tell the community about your playstyle, gear setup, or favorite clubs...
setup.cityPlaceholder: e.g. San Jose or Rio de Janeiro
setup.successDescription: Your public profile is now live and ready for match play.
setup.errorConflict: That username is already taken. Please choose another handle.
setup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong creating your profile. Please try again.

public.noClubs: Not currently affiliated with a public club.
public.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find a public player card with this handle. The player may have set their profile to private or changed their username.
